action.reasoning: Observation: Starting fresh with empty workspace. Need to implement basic model and training script to establish baseline. Analysis: Will create a simple CNN-based model using pre-trained wav2vec2 encoder, train for few epochs to validate pipeline. Decision: Create model.py, train.py, predict.py with minimal viable implementation.
